title: cheilanthes hassleri
intro: Cheilanthes hassleri, also known as Hassler's lip fern, is a species of fern in the family Woodsiaceae, native to the tropical forests of Argentina and Paraguay. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cheilanthes hassleri include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
